In the Margastr§a year of Jupiter there will be drought,
destruction of crops as a result of pests like wild animals, rats,
locusts and birds, outbreak of epidemics and kings' hostilities
even with their friends,

In the Pau^a year of Jupiter the world will be happy and
prosperous, kings will be free from enmity among themselves, the
prices of food grains will go up two-fold or three-fold, and preser-
vative work will flourish.
[Bhatjotpala interprets etc. as fall in prices of corn.

sTORranI
In the Magha year of Jupiter people would worship the
manes (and parents and elders) with greater devotion, and all beings
would enjoy happiness and contentment as well as sound health.
